name: cross-review-bridge
description: Codex Desktop in-app browser cross-review workflows for ChatGPT web.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-check work through ChatGPT web in Codex Desktop.
interface.longDescription: Prepare compact local project briefs, route them through ChatGPT web in the Codex Desktop in-app browser with user approval, then synthesize and verify feedback back in Codex Desktop. This is the in-app browser variant, not a generic Chrome-profile or ChatGPT desktop GUI handoff. API-backed review is disabled unless explicitly requested.
defaultPrompt: Use Cross Review Bridge through ChatGPT web.
Use Cross Review Bridge to review this bug.
Use Cross Review Bridge to synthesize external feedback.
